title: RDF Graph
description: Schema describing an RDF graph as defined by the RDF/JSON serialization format (application/rdf+json). An RDF graph is a set of triples organized by subject, where each subject maps to an array of predicate-object pairs.

additionalProperties.description: A subject resource identified by its IRI or blank node identifier, mapping predicates to arrays of object values.
An array of object values associated with a given predicate for this subject.

objectValue.description: An RDF object value in the RDF/JSON serialization format.

type.description: The type of the object value: uri for IRI references, literal for literal values, or bnode for blank nodes.

value.description: The value of the object: an IRI string for uri type, lexical form for literal type, or blank node identifier for bnode type.

lang.description: A BCP47 language tag, present only when the object is a language-tagged literal.

datatype.description: The datatype IRI for typed literals. Defaults to xsd:string when not specified.
